overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through ancient Alexandria at dusk. The camera follows the character through cobblestone streets lined with Greco-Roman architecture, passing the Pharos lighthouse in the distance, and ending in a grand plaza with columns and statues. The lighting transitions from golden hour to deep blue hour as the character moves through the historic city.

events.description: camel rider passes from right to left across the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cobblestone street toward an intersection, passing by ancient buildings

notable_agents.action: riding a camel across the street from right to left

entered.detail: circular stone temple with columns and domed roof
tall white marble statue on decorated stone base
tall palm trees behind the temple structure
multi-story stone buildings with balconies and wooden shutters
bright full moon visible in the evening sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a cobblestone street in ancient Alexandria at dusk, with a round temple and large statue on the left and residential buildings on the right. A camel rider crosses the path from right to left, and the full moon is visible in the sky.

events.description: character turns right at the intersection
character turns left, bringing the round temple back into view on the right

agents.ego_description: navigating through an intersection, turning right then left around the city block

entered.detail: tall white lighthouse with smoke rising from the top, visible in the distance
high stone wall with intricate carvings and decorative borders

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at the intersection, revealing the distant Pharos lighthouse. After a brief walk, they turn left, bringing the round temple into view on the right side while walking alongside a carved stone wall.

events.description: street opens into a large plaza with columns and statues

agents.ego_description: walking along a walled street toward the lighthouse, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the same direction along the wall

entered.detail: imposing multi-story stone building with columns and balconies
stone pillar with burning fire on top, mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow street lined with high carved walls and burning torch braziers, with the Pharos lighthouse growing larger in the distance. The lighting deepens to blue hour as they approach a large open plaza.

events.description: ambient light shifts to deeper blue hour as character enters the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand plaza, observing the columns and statues while moving toward the center

notable_agents.action: camel rider moving through the plaza

entered.detail: rows of tall white and red painted columns lining the plaza entrance
classical stone statues mounted on high columns and pedestals
red fabric banners hanging from poles between the columns
single-story stone buildings with tiled roofs surrounding the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand ceremonial plaza filled with tall painted columns, statues on pedestals, and red banners fluttering in the evening breeze. The Pharos lighthouse remains visible in the distance as the sky darkens to deep blue, and other pedestrians and camel riders move through the open space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the streets of ancient Alexandria as the golden dusk transitions into a deep blue evening. It begins with the character walking down a cobblestone street past a round temple and a large statue, while a camel rider crosses their path under a visible full moon. As the character turns through a series of intersections, the Pharos lighthouse emerges in the distance, and the path shifts alongside carved stone walls and burning torch braziers. The scene then narrows through a corridor of high walls before opening up as the lighting deepens into the blue hour. Finally, the camera enters a grand ceremonial plaza filled with painted columns, fluttering red banners, and statues, with the lighthouse looming large against the darkening sky.
